f44de827-67d2-4181-b75a-7258963d6738.title: Golrie
f44de827-67d2-4181-b75a-7258963d6738.text:
What are you doing down here? Leave before you get
yourself into trouble.

4a15134b-d414-4aa8-b1c0-54f90b1b23f8.title: <player>
4a15134b-d414-4aa8-b1c0-54f90b1b23f8.text: Who are you, and what are you doing here?

bc511923-84b4-4671-8270-c8f0a653c0a5.title: Golrie
bc511923-84b4-4671-8270-c8f0a653c0a5.text:
I'm Golrie, and this is my home. Thing is, as you can
see, I've got a small problem. Those hob-gobs are all
over the place trying to steal my family's heirlooms. I've
been stuck here for ages!

d0a9fc1e-bc27-4850-aac3-3acc63b52bfa.title: Golrie
d0a9fc1e-bc27-4850-aac3-3acc63b52bfa.text:
Oh don't worry, I'm sure I'll work something out. I
just need some time to think.

ee28e516-d2d2-4714-897a-e1d6ecada7da.title: <player>
ee28e516-d2d2-4714-897a-e1d6ecada7da.text: In that case, do you mind if I have a look around?

741cd023-6522-4c41-b32b-996ef8aa77f4.text:
You look amongst the junk on the floor and find
Glarial's pebble.

b2f982e4-cb77-41c5-84c9-9c85441b8454.title: <player>
b2f982e4-cb77-41c5-84c9-9c85441b8454.text: Could I take this old pebble?

cf7137d8-ea03-497e-be06-3e4cdd9ff857.title: Golrie
cf7137d8-ea03-497e-be06-3e4cdd9ff857.text:
Oh that. Yes, have it. It's just some old elven junk I
believe.

d3779787-0654-44f0-8dca-622d596fa9e8.title: Golrie
d3779787-0654-44f0-8dca-622d596fa9e8.text:
Not yet, but don't worry. I'm sure I'll work something
out. I just need some time to think.

051eca2f-dc94-47f8-ae04-520e138dce92.title: <player>
051eca2f-dc94-47f8-ae04-520e138dce92.text: Do you mind if I have another look through this stuff?

a4d615b0-4684-4ca8-97ed-53e30ab16bf5.text:
You look amongst the junk on the floor and find
Glarial's pebble.
